root_causes: The latest React bundle contained the native City/Town and verified-phone UI, but index.html still used an older reused version label while server.js cached every versioned asset as immutable for one year.

post-ad-category-fields.js permanently returned when the first page load was not /post or /post-ad, so category-specific helpers did not activate after client-side SPA navigation from Home to Post Ad.
Two 900 ms polling loops duplicated MutationObserver work on public pages.
fixes: All local JS/CSS references are generated from their current SHA-256 content hashes.
Only content-hash version URLs receive immutable caching; reused human-readable labels must revalidate.
The category/location helper now checks the current route dynamically and activates after SPA navigation.
Permanent Post Ad polling loops were removed, and MutationObservers now run only on Post Ad or Dashboard routes.
All 100 static ad route shells were synchronized from the corrected index.html.
preserved_flows: unified SMS OTP signup/password reset/contact verification
authenticated publishing and Dashboard My Ads
public browsing and ad detail routes
production_test_note: The live Vercel/Supabase/Text.lk environment was not modified or used for a real OTP, database insert, or production publish test.
